## Optional Agent Instructions

Use these only when you want an agent to apply specific repository skills during review.

- `update-eng-style-guide`
- `update-style-guide`
- `update-engineering-style-guide`
- `[skill:update-eng-style-guide]`
- `update style guide`
- `update eng style guide`
- `update engineering style guide`
- `consolidate-session-learnings`
- `[skill:consolidate-session-learnings]`
- `consolidate session learnings`
- `operations`
- `[skill:operations]`
- `operations pattern`
- `ops review`

Example:

> Please apply `[skill:update-eng-style-guide]` for this PR and update guidance docs
> if new style/process conventions are introduced.
